deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Lien resolved via notary on April 21.
deals.next: Deliver joy gift basket, rug, trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank you note to Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded
Cleared and funded
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary, delivered to Chicago Title

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acre hunting property. Price reduced to $117,500. Michael Rodriguez offer dead, no earnest money received. Steve completed clearing. Ready for qualified buyers.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve on clearing completion. Lead next offer with net after close, not gross price or line items.

logs.m: Price amendment signed. MLS updated to $117,500. Agent outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. First offer dead. Strategy confirmed: lead with net after close.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup and remodel active. Electrical and water utilities being set up. Listing agreement needed for bank.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application. Confirm water setup with EMCSUD. Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Floor demo complete, drywall cut for trades. Utility providers confirmed. Listing paperwork to Jerry and Ray pending.
Work officially started, dumpsters running

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater ~$93K-$143K. Double-carrying costs. Chandler laid off. Leaning toward short sale. Payoff ~$493K. Market value $350K-$400K.
deals.next: Draft short sale client email. Lauren debrief on Newrez packet requirements. Get hardship documentation from sellers.

logs.m: Call completed. Matt and Chandler leaning toward short sale. Hardship documentation ready.
Where Things Stand email sent with three paths and market analysis

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold, need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction, no HOA. Pre-approval status unknown with Zach Schaphorst.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Set up new construction search platform. Identify builders with no HOA.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing
Rental being sold. Introduced new construction idea. They were receptive.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Relocated to NC second week of June. MLS live May 14. First showing completed with cultural feedback. Roof claim in progress.
deals.next: Monitor for offers. Roof/fascia decision pending insurance adjuster. Furniture negotiable with sale.

logs.m: 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30 PM. Investor cash offer at $176,300 communicated.
MLS live, sign and lockbox dropped, canvassed neighborhood, first showing 9:15am

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land with development potential. Sisters want listing extension. Isaac interested in mobile home development concept (~$150K offer). Title defect being corrected by attorney Van Hutchins.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Discuss Isaac development offer formally. Follow up with all prior prospects.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Isaac exploring mobile home development (10-acre lots). Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball contacted. Title defect found. Correction Deed in progress.

deals.title: Milagros Stringer - New Construction
deals.notes: New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P+I. Builder rate buydowns key angle. Not locked to Grace Gardens.
deals.next: Follow up with Milagros on timeline and interest. Confirm MI Homes option review. Pull inventory from multiple builders.

logs.m: MI Homes option from Frank. Need to follow up on Milagros timeline.
Buyer rep agreement sent via Skyslope

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Rental
deals.notes: 2025 Lennar home. $1,595/month rent. 12-month lease. No pets. WiFi and W/D included. HOA $300/quarter. Listing agreement needs signature.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope. Get Jimbo signatures. Schedule professional photos. Order vinyl signs.

logs.m: Listing agreement reviewed, 12 questions sent to Jimbo. All answered same day.
Talked to Jimbo on road. Son made flyers. Confirmed ready to move forward.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: 485 FM 462, Moore TX. 3BR/2BA on 4.05 acres. Divorce situation. Payoff ~$257K. Recommended $295K listing. Net sheet built.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage on-site. Discuss contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. Listing presentation with net sheet built.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing story through plants. Potential content collaboration. No rush on real estate.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story content.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Met in person. Buy box unknown. Likely Schertz area interest. Also interested in Borregas development concept.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: 13810 Tangle Tree St. Property 90% complete. Already working with realtor. Open to as-is sale. Opportunity if current agent stalls.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer pre-market promotion to network. Stay relational.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Neighbor behind Miss Pat. Deceased was avid gardener. Son inherited. Do not rush. Sensitive situation with natural community connection.
leads.next: Get son name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out as neighbor and gardener first.

leads.title: Bryce - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Dumpster contractor at 181 CR 7751. Wife active military, VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, renting in San Antonio. Looking to purchase.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full buyer and property details.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helped Brandon get into real estate. Has uncle with rental property and mom looking to buy new construction.
leads.next: Send PM company options. Confirm exact Green Bliss address. Connect Milagros with builders. Register buyer agent on first visit.

leads.title: Kurt - Prospect
leads.detail: Around corner from 9815 Conbes. Wants intel on nearby listing under contract at $275K. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up on his interest. Determine if seller, buyer, or curious.
